title: PROCEDURE FOR KEEPING RECORDS OF INVENTORIES IN SERVICE ENTERPRISES.
author: Ahmatova, Mukhlisa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article discusses the procedures of inventory accounting in service enterprises, focusing on documentation, valuation, and financial impact. Accurate inventory tracking in service organizations is crucial for calculating costs, ensuring financial transparency, and maintaining control over resource use. Systematic and standard-based accounting supports effective management decisions.
steps_raw: This article discusses the procedures of inventory accounting in service enterprises, focusing on documentation, valuation, and financial impact.
